---
title: "Eliza Harriott Keary"
---

## Eliza Harriott Keary

**Dates:** (1827-1918)

### Description

sister of Annie Keary, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1865-79)

### Biography

[ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 3d [1887]
- Letter from June 25 [1886]
- Letter from Novr 8th  [1871]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
